name: @intentsolutionsio/performance-regression-detector
description: Detect performance regressions in CI/CD pipeline

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install performance-regression-detector\\n  or /plugin install performance-regression-detector@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
